name: Flock Team Messaging API
what_it_does: Team messaging and collaboration platform with REST API — enabling teams to communicate via channels, direct messages, and threads with bot integrations, slash commands, and webhooks, providing a Slack alternative with strong India market presence and competitive pricing, with API support for custom bot development and workflow automation.
use_cases: Building bots via Flock Bot API for team workflow automation and notifications
Sending channel notifications via Flock Incoming Webhook for CI/CD and monitoring alerts
Integrating business apps via Flock API for unified team notifications
Creating slash commands via Flock API for team productivity automation
Managing channels and users via Flock API for team administration
not_for: Large enterprise with complex compliance requirements (use Slack Enterprise or Microsoft Teams)
Teams heavily invested in Slack app ecosystem (Flock has fewer third-party integrations)
Organizations needing SOC2 Type II or enterprise security features at scale
best_when: An India-based team or startup needs a cost-effective Slack alternative — where Flock provides familiar team messaging with a competitive price point and basic bot/webhook API for notification automation.
avoid_when: You're in a large enterprise with compliance requirements, rely on Slack's extensive app marketplace, or need advanced enterprise security features.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow for bot/app authentication. Token-based API access. Incoming webhooks (no auth — webhook URL is the secret). Slash commands authenticated via token. Bot tokens for programmatic access. Scoped OAuth2 (channels:read, channels:write, chat:write, etc.). App development via Flock Developer Dashboard.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: unlimited messages, 10K searchable messages, 5GB storage
pricing.notes: Indian company (Mumbai). Founded 2014 by Bhavin Turakhia and Bharathwaj Shankar. Part of Directi group (domain registrar empire). Raised $26M+ Series A. Strong in India SMB market. 45,000+ teams. 30+ integrations (Trello, Asana, GitHub, Jira). Video calling. Task management built-in. Note-sharing. Polls. Much cheaper than Slack. Used by: Indian startups, SMBs, small enterprises. Less popular in US/Europe than India. API compatible but smaller ecosystem than Slack.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with OAuth2. Incoming webhooks. Slash commands. Bot development via developer dashboard. GDPR compliant. Indian company. Free plan. Smaller API ecosystem than Slack. Limited public documentation completeness.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Message sends not idempotent — duplicates possible. Channel/user reads idempotent. Use unique message IDs for deduplication tracking. Webhook delivery at-least-once.
known_agent_gotchas: Incoming webhook URL is the auth credential — treat as secret; rotating is done in Flock dashboard
OAuth2 scopes are Flock-specific — not Slack-compatible despite similar patterns
Indian company — data may be stored in India or US; check data residency for EU compliance
Smaller developer ecosystem than Slack — fewer community libraries and examples
API documentation less complete than Slack — may need to test undocumented behaviors
Flock's pricing model has changed — verify current pricing before committing

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR claimed. OAuth2 with scopes. Indian company — Indian data protection law considerations plus GDPR for EU users. Webhook URL as auth (must protect). No independent security audit history. US/India data residency.
